title: Inscription For A Well In Memory Of The Martyrs Of The War
content:
Fall, stream, from Heaven to bless; return as well;
    So did our sons; Heaven met them as they fell.
meaning:
Ralph Waldo Emerson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Inscription For A Well In Memory Of The Martyrs Of The War"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
